rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 13, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE, CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint Re: Punitive damages is GRANTED with final leave to allege facts, not conclusions re: "active concealment," "intent to deprive Plaintiffs of their rights" and "intent to cause harm." New allegations shall be made in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 13, 2016 line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT continued to August 11, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative cross-complaint (the Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of opposition and reply). Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than July 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY E ODBERT VS. DONALD PIPKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton Nd Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Mpa; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 13, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT LORNA PIPKINS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. Defendant also failed to comply with CCP 1167.4. = (501/REQ)
